snapshot.title: Fix local CI Supabase env quoting and cleanup resilience
snapshot.description: Ensure frontend-cypress workflow works with local Supabase only: strip quoted env values, avoid secret dependency assumptions, and make e2e cleanup tolerant when test user was not created.

acceptanceCriteria.text: e2e user create handles quoted/local URL values
workflow exports local Supabase vars without invalid quotes
cleanup step does not fail pipeline when TEST_USER_ID is absent

oldValue.text: e2e user create handles quoted/local URL values
workflow exports local Supabase vars without invalid quotes
cleanup step does not fail pipeline when TEST_USER_ID is absent

newValue.text: e2e user create handles quoted/local URL values
workflow exports local Supabase vars without invalid quotes
cleanup step does not fail pipeline when TEST_USER_ID is absent

changes.newValue: Fixed CI local Supabase env quoting issue by stripping surrounding quotes in workflow export step (API_URL/ANON_KEY/SERVICE_ROLE_KEY). Hardened e2e create/cleanup scripts with env sanitization and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY fallback. Added default local URL fallback (127.0.0.1:54321). Cleanup now exits successfully when TEST_USER_ID is absent, preventing false-fail after create step errors.

changes.newValue:
Fixed CI local Supabase env quoting issue by stripping surrounding quotes in workflow export step (API_URL/ANON_KEY/SERVICE_ROLE_KEY). Hardened e2e create/cleanup scripts with env sanitization and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY fallback. Added default local URL fallback (127.0.0.1:54321). Cleanup now exits successfully when TEST_USER_ID is absent, preventing false-fail after create step errors.

Follow-up patch: strip surrounding quotes in workflow export values to prevent Invalid URL in e2e create script. Added env sanitization + local defaults in create/cleanup scripts; cleanup now skips cleanly when TEST_USER_ID is absent.
